title: tragopogon fibrosus
intro: Tragopogon fibrosus, also known as the brittle fleawort or rough salsify, is a perennial plant belonging to the dandelion family that is native to the mountainous regions of the Mediterranean. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Tragopogon fibrosus include its potential to help with digestive issues, reduce inflammation, and support the immune system. Tragopogon fibrosus can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and decoctions, as well as being used in tinctures and salves, making it a versatile and valuable medicinal plant.
